form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind Without Compare with 61kg at $7.30. Before that ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Sha Tin on March 8 over 1800m, 0.5 len behind Stunning Peach carrying 52kg at $12. Gets Purton back on board now and he rates highly.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Recent form sound. Most recently raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1650m, 0.5 len behind Without Compare with 61kg at $7.30. Before that ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Sha Tin on March 8 over 1800m, 0.5 len behind Stunning Peach carrying 52kg at $12. Gets Purton back on board now and he rates highly.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Last start 4th of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1800m, 3 len behind Fallon carrying 57.5kg at $52. The race before that ran last of 14 at Sha Tin on February 19 over 2000m, 23 len behind Gentlemen Legacy carrying 59.5kg at $10. Shapes up nicely.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Last start 4th of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1800m, 3 len behind Fallon carrying 57.5kg at $52. The race before that ran last of 14 at Sha Tin on February 19 over 2000m, 23 len behind Gentlemen Legacy carrying 59.5kg at $10. Shapes up nicely.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover for the majority of the event.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last campaign 11th of 14 at Sha Tin February 1 over 1600m, 6 len behind Lucky Sam Gor with 57.5kg at $17. Previous preparation first-up won by nose this track September 10 over 1650m defeating Highland Rahy carrying 54.5kg at $8.70. Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last campaign 11th of 14 at Sha Tin February 1 over 1600m, 6 len behind Lucky Sam Gor with 57.5kg at $17. Previous preparation first-up won by nose this track September 10 over 1650m defeating Highland Rahy carrying 54.5kg at $8.70. Has to be respected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1200m bumped by Beauty Crescent when that horse was racing keenly.
Shifted out at the start and was bumped.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently raced on the pace when 2nd of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1650m, neck behind Win Beauty Viva carrying 56kg at $7. The race before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 13 at Sha Tin on February 19 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Riding Together with 56.5kg at $9.60. Hard to knock on recent form and it wouldn't surprise to see him go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Recent form sound. Most recently raced on the pace when 2nd of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1650m, neck behind Win Beauty Viva carrying 56kg at $7. Hard to knock on recent form and it wouldn't surprise to see him go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover from the 800m.
Crowded at the start, then shifted in despite the efforts of its rider.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1650m, 5 len behind Without Compare with 57.5kg at $12. The run before that 11th of 14 at Sha Tin on March 8 over 1400m, 5 len behind Winning Ovation carrying 57.5kg at $47. Finds a nice race and can improve without surprising.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start became unbalanced when it was bumped by Loch Tay.

form.formComment: At the latest run 10th of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1650m, 3.5 len behind Win Beauty Viva with 56kg at $24. The run before that second last of 12 at this track on March 4 over 1650m, 5 len behind Fivefortwo with 54.5kg at $16. Not keen on his chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped only fairly. Raced keenly in the early stages.
Making the home turn was hampered when taken wider.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 12 at this track on March 25 over 1650m, 5 len behind Without Compare carrying 55kg at $3.90. The race before that favourite; won by a head at this track March 4 over 1650m defeating Glorious Journey carrying 60.5kg at $6. Can bounce back to winning ways.

form.formComment: Last start 10th of 14 at Sha Tin on March 29 over 1600m, 5 len behind The Golden Knight carrying 54kg at $110. Before that eased back early on 10th of 14 at Sha Tin on March 8 over 1400m, 5 len behind Winning Ovation carrying 55.5kg at $44. Might struggle again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 8th of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1650m, 3 len behind Win Beauty Viva carrying 54kg at $105. Previously second-up got back early 11th of 14 at Sha Tin on January 11 over 1600m, 8 len behind Invincible Ibis with 53kg at $50. Prepared to take him on again today in this company.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run favourite; won by 0.5 len at this track March 25 over 1650m defeating Take Action carrying 58kg at $2.80. The race before that favourite; won by 1.3 len at this track March 11 over 1650m defeating Run Run Timing with 55.5kg at $16. Looks set to bring up the hat-trick with no weight on his back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in shortly after the start and was bumped.
From the outside barrier, shifted across behind runners in the early stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run 9th of 12 at Sha Tin on March 29 over 2000m, 11 len behind Charity Together carrying 60kg at $11. The race before that eased back early on 9th of 14 at Sha Tin on March 1 over 1800m, 4 len behind Storm Runner carrying 60.5kg at $10. Worth following up.
